rows.description: Computus Joannis Conybeare Rectoris a 2do Die Novembris 1730 ad eundem Diem revolutum 1731.
rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini's transcription of the header. Visual verification against the image confirmed its accuracy for names, dates, and spelling. claude-haiku had multiple transcription errors in the Latin text.
Selected gpt-5-mini's transcription. Visual verification confirmed 'Arrearagia' (with 'ar' ligature) and the absence of a period. claude-haiku missed an 'r' and added a period.
Amounts (10 0 0) were in agreement between extractors. Selected gpt-5-mini's description 'Guinear' as visually more accurate than claude-haiku's 'Burwear'.
Amounts (26 12 9 0.5) were in agreement, with both models correctly identifying the 'ob' half-penny mark. Selected gpt-5-mini's description for correctly capitalizing 'Long'.
Selected gpt-5-mini's entry. Visual verification confirmed 'Minhinsett' and the amounts (40 0 0). claude-haiku misread the description as 'Cricklade' and amounts as '20 0 0'.
Amounts (145 0 0) were in agreement. Selected gpt-5-mini's description 'South Newington Recd.' as visually more accurate than claude-haiku's 'South Morningon Lect.'.
Amounts (20 0 0) were in agreement. Selected gpt-5-mini's description 'Cuddington Recd.' as visually more accurate than claude-haiku's 'Ceddington Lect.'.
Amounts (14 8 10) were in agreement. Selected gpt-5-mini's description 'Chase-hill' for correctly including the hyphen. claude-haiku rendered it as 'Chase Hill'.
Selected gpt-5-mini's entry. Visual verification confirmed 'Lucas Eaton' and the amounts (2 0 0). claude-haiku misread the description as 'Lear Eajon' and amounts as '14 8 10'.

Selected gpt-5-mini's entry. Amounts (14 3 3) are clearly visible. The description 'Tue Quit Rents' is the most plausible reading; 'Tue' is slightly ambiguous but 'Quit Rents' is clear. claude-haiku had significant errors in both description and amounts.
Selected gpt-5-mini's entry. Visual verification confirmed 'Ralph Marshals Capons' and the amounts (0 7 6). claude-haiku had significant errors in both description and amounts.
Description 'Bigg' was in agreement. Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate amounts (10 9 11). claude-haiku misread amounts as '0 7 5'.
Selected gpt-5-mini's entry. Visual verification confirmed 'Calicot alias Lane' and the amounts (2 19 5). claude-haiku had significant errors in both description and amounts.
Selected gpt-5-mini's entry. Visual verification confirmed 'Bannister' and the amounts (0 15 0). claude-haiku misread the name slightly ('Bannitster') and had significant errors in amounts.
Selected gpt-5-mini's entry. Visual verification confirmed 'Leaden-Hall' and the amounts (1 0 0). claude-haiku misread the description as 'Sealden Hall' and amounts as '0 15 0'.
Description 'Sadler' was in agreement. Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate amounts (4 12 11). claude-haiku misread amounts as '1 0 0'.
Selected gpt-5-mini's entry. Visual verification confirmed 'Hart Hall' and the amounts (1 13 4). claude-haiku misread the description as 'Hast Hall' and amounts as '4 12 11'.

Selected gpt-5-mini's entry. Visual verification confirmed the description 'Napper' and the amounts (4 1 8) with the 'ob' half-penny mark (0.5). claude-haiku misread the name as 'Capper' and pence/fraction as '6 0.75'.
Amounts (4 10 4) were in agreement. Selected gpt-5-mini's description 'Clifton Penny' as visually more accurate than claude-haiku's 'Clifton Terry'.

Amounts (7 9 11 0.5) were in agreement, with both models correctly interpreting the 'ob' half-penny mark. Selected gpt-5-mini's description 'Brew-House' as visually more accurate than claude-haiku's 'Brew Harie'.

Amounts (6 0 0) were in agreement. Upon direct visual inspection, 'Trethewen' appears to be the most accurate transcription of the ambiguous description, overriding both models (gpt-5-mini: 'Prittcheven', claude-haiku: 'Crittenden').

Amounts (26 10 0) were in agreement. Selected gpt-5-mini's description 'Ladlane, Sparkes et Meriton' as visually more accurate, especially 'et' and 'Meriton', compared to claude-haiku's 'Sad lane, Sparkles of Merston'.
Selected gpt-5-mini's entry. Visual verification confirmed 'Medenham' (starting with a clear 'M') and the amounts (6 13 4). claude-haiku misread the description as 'Okedenham' and amounts as '5 3 4'.
Amounts (4 0 0) were in agreement. Selected gpt-5-mini's description 'Back Gate, Boyse' for correctly capitalizing 'Gate'. claude-haiku had 'Back gate, Boyse'.
